html:
Exclusive to:

The Terra Firma Tamper is a structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together and is used to craft certain turfs.

Its crafting Blueprint is unlocked from a Distilled Knowledge acquired from a yellow Fountain of Knowledge, after completing the Archive Orchestrina puzzle.

Trivia

  • The Terra Firma Tamper was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
  • Terra firma translates to "firm ground" from Latin, while tamper is an English word referring to how the Terra Firma Tamper makes turf.
  • Before the March 2022 QoL update, players had to stand next to the Terra Firma Tamper every time they had to craft turf.

Assets

  • Proximity animation
  • Old Terra Firma Tamper Station Icon
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“A true scientist is always breaking new ground!”
–Wilson
“I guess I could use a change in scenery.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will crush up dirt and turn into new dirt!”
–Wolfgang
“We can change the very earth beneath our feet, but not the past.”
–Wendy
“TERRAFORMING STATION. AT LAST”
–WX-78
“I surmise this was a crucial part of ancient farming methods.”
–Wickerbottom
“I think I'd make a good groundskeeper, whatcha think Luce?”
–Woodie
“I despise getting my hands dirty.”
–Maxwell
“The very gröund shall heed my will!”
–Wigfrid
“We always liked playing with dirt! Just remember to wash up before dinner.”
–Webber
“This recipe calls for some ground ingredients, non?”
–Warly
“Make dirt!”
–Wormwood
“Better pound the pavement! Ha!”
–Winona
“Mortals just love to change the world to suit them.”
–Wortox
“Yay! Can make so much more swamp, florp!”
–Wurt
“I think we might be tampering with something we don't understand.”
–Walter
“I've tampered with time, I guess I could tamper with the ground a bit too.”
–Wanda
The Terra Firma Tamper is a structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together and is used to craft certain turfs.
Its crafting Blueprint is unlocked from a Distilled Knowledge acquired from a yellow Fountain of Knowledge, after completing the Archive Orchestrina puzzle.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Terra Firma Tamper was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
Terra firma translates to "firm ground" from Latin, while tamper is an English word referring to how the Terra Firma Tamper makes turf.
Before the March 2022 QoL update, players had to stand next to the Terra Firma Tamper every time they had to craft turf.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Terra Firma Tamper là một cấu trúc độc quyền của Don't Starve Together và được sử dụng để chế tạo một số loại cỏ nhất định.

The '''Terra Firma Tamper''' is a [[Structures|structure]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' and is used to craft certain [[turfs]].

Its crafting [[Blueprint]] is unlocked from a [[Distilled Knowledge]] acquired from a yellow [[Fountain of Knowledge]], after completing the [[Archive Orchestrina]] puzzle.

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Terra Firma Tamper was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Forgotten Knowledge|Forgotten Knowledge]]'' update.
* Terra firma translates to "firm ground" from Latin, while tamper is an English word referring to how the Terra Firma Tamper makes turf.
* Before the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#March 24, 2022 - March 2022 QoL Update|March 2022 QoL update]], players had to stand next to the Terra Firma Tamper every time they had to craft turf.
